EN | MNBook Consultation

OUR SERVICES

What We Offer

01

Custom Furniture Design

From concept to completion, we design furniture tailored to your exact specifications. Choose from hundreds of materials, finishes, and configurations to create pieces that perfectly fit your space and style.

02

Interior Solutions

Our design team works with you to create cohesive interior spaces. From single rooms to full homes and commercial spaces, we provide comprehensive design services including space planning, material selection, and furniture curation.

03

Commercial Projects

We partner with businesses, hotels, and real estate developers to furnish commercial spaces at scale. Our project management team ensures consistent quality, on-time delivery, and seamless installation across multiple locations.

04

Installation & Delivery

White-glove delivery and professional installation services ensure your furniture arrives in perfect condition and is set up exactly where you want it. We handle everything from transport to final placement.

Taij-Khurai

Mongolian craftsmanship meets Scandinavian minimalism. Premium custom furniture brand.
